metadata.title: Auto Note Mover
metadata.description: Auto Note Mover will automatically move the active notes to their respective folders according to the rules.

regex.source:
Notice(`[Auto Note Mover]
"Error: The destination folder
"${settingFolder}"
does not exist.`)
regex.target:
注意(`[自动移动文件]
"错误: 目标文件夹
"${settingFolder}"
不存在.`)

regex.source:
Notice(`[Auto Note Mover]
Error: A file with the same name
"${fileFullName}"
exists at the destination folder.`)
regex.target:
注意(`[自动移动文件]
错误: 有相同名字的文件
"${fileFullName}"
存在于目标文件夹中.`)

regex.source:
Notice(`[Auto Note Mover]
Moved the note "${fileFullName}"
to the "${settingFolder}".`)
regex.target:
注意(`[自动移动文件
移动文件 "${fileFullName}"
到 "${settingFolder}".`)

regex.source: Notice(`You can set either the tag or the title.`)
regex.target: 注意(`你可以设置 tag 或标题.`)
注意("这个 tag 已经被使用.")
注意("这个模式已经被使用过了.")

regex.target: 注意("在前页中禁用自动移动文件.")
注意("[自动移动文件]\手动触发.")
注意("[自动移动文件]\自动触发.")

regex.source: .log(`[Auto Note Mover] Moved the note "${fileFullName}" to the "${settingFolder}".`)
regex.target: .日志(`[自动移动文件] 移动文件 "${fileFullName}" 到 "${settingFolder}".`)

regex.source: .error(['Popper: "arrow" element must be an HTMLElement (not an SVGElement)
regex.target: .错误(['Popper: "arrow" 元素必须是一个HTML元素 (不是SVG元素)

regex.source: .error(['Popper: "arrow" modifier\'s `element` must be a child of the popper', "element."].join(" ")

regex.source: .error(["Popper: The `allowedAutoPlacements` option did not allow any", "placements. Ensure the `placement` option matches the variation", "of the allowed placements.", 'For example, "auto" cannot be used to allow "bottom-start".', 'Use "auto-start" instead.'].join(" ")
regex.target: .错误(["Popper: The `allowedAutoPlacements` option did not allow any", "placements. Ensure the `placement` option matches the variation", "of the allowed placements.", 'For example, "auto" cannot be used to allow "bottom-start".', 'Use "auto-start" instead.'].join(" ")

regex.source: .error('PopperJS: an invalid property has been provided to the "' + modifier.name + '" modifier, valid properties are ' + VALID_PROPERTIES.map(function(s)
regex.target: .错误('PopperJS: an invalid property has been provided to the "' + modifier.name + '" modifier, valid properties are ' + VALID_PROPERTIES.map(function(s)

regex.source: .error(['Popper: "auto" placements require the "flip" modifier be', "present and enabled to work."].join(" ")
regex.target: .错误(['Popper: "auto" placements require the "flip" modifier be', "present and enabled to work."].join(" ")

regex.source: .error(`[Auto Note Mover] The destination folder "${settingFolder}" does not exist.`)
regex.target: .错误(`[自动移动文件] 目标文件夹 "${settingFolder}" 不存在.`)

regex.source: .error(`[Auto Note Mover] Error: A file with the same name "${fileFullName}" exists at the destination folder.`)
regex.target: .错误(`[自动移动文件] Error: 有相同名字的文件 "${fileFullName}" 存在于目标文件夹.`)

regex.source: text: "If you want to use the suggested tags as they are, it is recommended to disable this setting."
regex.target: text: "如果您希望原样使用建议的tag,建议禁用此设置。"

regex.source: text: "You can set either the tag or the title. "
regex.target: text: "您可以设置 tag 或标题。 "
text: "自动移动文件: 禁用"

regex.source: .setName("Use regular expressions to check for tags")
.setName("Use regular expressions to check for excluded folder")
regex.target: .setName("使用正则表达式检查排除的文件夹")

regex.source: .setDesc("Auto Note Mover will automatically move the active notes to their respective folders according to the rules.")
regex.target: .setDesc("自动移动文件将根据规则自动将活动笔记移动到各自的文件夹中。")

regex.source: .append("Choose how the trigger will be activated.
"is triggered when you create, edit, or rename a note, and moves the note if it matches the rules."
regex.target: "在创建、编辑或重命名笔记时触发，如果符合规则，则移动该笔记。"

regex.source: "You can also activate the trigger with a command."
append("If enabled, tags will be checked with regular expressions."
regex.target: append("如果启用，将使用正则表达式检查标记。"

regex.source: "For example, if you want to match the #tag, you would write "
regex.target: "例如，如果要匹配 #tag, 您可以这样写 "

regex.source: "This setting is for a specific purpose, such as specifying nested tags in bulk."
regex.target: "此设置用于特定目的，例如批量指定嵌套tags."

regex.source: append("1. Set the destination folder.", descEl.createEl("br"), "2. Set a tag or title that matches the note you want to move. "
regex.target: append("1. 设置目标文件夹。", descEl.createEl("br"), "2. 设置与要移动的注释匹配的tag或标题。 "

regex.source: "3. The rules are checked in order from the top. The notes will be moved to the folder with the "
regex.target: "3. 规则是从上到下依次检查的。笔记将被移动到文件夹与 "

regex.source: "at the beginning.", descEl.createEl("br"), "Title: Tested by JavaScript regular expressions."
regex.target: "一开始.", descEl.createEl("br"), "标题: 通过JavaScript正则表达式测试."

regex.source: "1. Attached files will not be moved, but they will still appear in the note.", descEl.createEl("br"), '2. Auto Note Mover will not move notes that have "', descEl.createEl("strong"
regex.target: "1.附件不会被移动，但它们仍然会出现在笔记中。", descEl.createEl("br"), '2.  "自动移动文件将不会移动', descEl.createEl("strong"

regex.source: .append("If enabled, excluded folder will be checked with regular expressions.");
regex.target: .append("如果启用，将使用正则表达式检查排除的文件夹。");

regex.source: append("Notes in the excluded folder will not be moved.", descEl.createEl("br"), "This takes precedence over the notes movement rules.");
regex.target: append("排除文件夹中的文件将不会被移动。", descEl.createEl("br"), "这优先于文件移动规则。");

regex.source: .append("The status bar will display [A] if the trigger is Automatic, and [M] for Manual.", descEl.createEl("br"), "To change the setting, you need to restart Obsidian.", descEl.createEl("br"), "Desktop only.");
regex.target: .append("如果触发是自动触发，状态栏会显示[A]，如果是手动触发，状态栏会显示[M]。", descEl.createEl("br"), "要更改设置，需要重新启动Obsidian。", descEl.createEl("br"), "桌面。");
